title: Exam Registration 报名考试
scene: 在考试中心报名参加考试

lines.en: Hello. How can I help you today?
lines.zh: 您好。今天有什么可以帮您的？

lines.en: I'd like to register for the TOEFL exam next month.
lines.zh: 我想报名参加下个月的托福考试。

lines.en: Certainly. Do you have an account on the registration website?
lines.zh: 好的。您在报名网站上有账号吗？

lines.en: Yes, I created one last week.
lines.zh: 有的，我上周注册了一个。

lines.en: Good. Please log in and select your preferred test date and location.
lines.zh: 好的。请登录并选择您偏好的考试日期和地点。

lines.en: I'd like to take it on October 15th at the downtown center.
lines.zh: 我想在十月十五号市中心考点考。

lines.en: Let me check availability. Yes, that date is open.
lines.zh: 让我查一下是否有名额。是的，那个日期还有名额。

lines.en: How much is the registration fee?
The fee is two hundred and thirty-five dollars.
lines.zh: 费用是二百三十五美元。

lines.en: Here's the payment. Thank you for your help.
lines.zh: 这是费用。谢谢您的帮助。
